sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60923" key="kuno/prason" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠνό-πρᾰσον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n60923.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dog-leek</tr_>, a plant, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
